name: Marinated Ginger Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. NOTE: For the best flavor, use fresh ingredients such as grated ginger root and imported soy sauce if possible. These can often be found in local Asian markets.
2. Cut the chicken into serving pieces if it is not already cut. Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice, vegetable oil, imported soy sauce, ground ginger (or grated ginger), onion salt, and garlic powder.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken, making sure all pieces are well coated.
5. Cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or overnight, turning occasionally to ensure even coating.
6. When ready to cook, grill or broil the chicken, basting frequently with the marinade.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers.
